channel.display-name: O Homem que veio do Céu

programme.title: Las tortugas ninja
programme.desc: Leonardo, Raphael, Donnatello y Michelangelo son cuatro tortugas mutantes que crecieron en las alcantarillas de Nueva York. Entrenadas en el legendario arte del Ninjutsu por su maestro Splinter, una rata también mutante.

programme.title: Pluto TV Sci-Fi
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Il radioastronomo Zane Zaminsky crede di aver rilevato un rumore cosmico che prova l'esistenza di un'intelligenza extraterrestre. LA sua disperata ricerca di una risposta lo porta a scoprire che gli alieni sono già sulla Terra.

programme.title: Mega Shark Vs Kolossus
programme.desc: Mentre sta cercando una nuova fonte di energia, la Russia risveglia involontariamente un gigantesco robot di nome Kolossus creato ai tempi della guerra fredda. Intanto dal fondo dell'oceano emerge un nuovo Mega Shark che minaccia la terra.

programme.title: Man from earth
programme.desc: Il party a sorpresa per il pensionamento del professor John Oldman si trasforma in un mistero quando l'uomo rivela ai suoi colleghi di essere in realtà un immortale che erra sulla terra da ormai 14 mila anni.

programme.title: King Cobra
programme.desc: Un serpente lungo 9 metri è fuggito da un laboratorio che stava conducendo ricerche sull'aggressività e sta per intrufolarsi nella festa di una piccola città.

programme.title: After the dark
programme.desc: Un misterioso professore di filosofia sfida la sua classe. Utilizzando il solo potere della logica, dovranno scegliere chi tra loro sarebbe degno di un posto in un rifugio sotterraneo costruito per resistere a un'apocalisse nucleare.

programme.title: Dylan Dog: dead of night
programme.desc: Dylan Dog indaga su casi che coinvolgono zombie e morti viventi. Armato di pallottole d'argento e un'intelligenza fuori dal comune, deve scoprire dove si trovi uno strumento che potrebbe scatenare una guerra senza pari fra zombie, vampiri e licantropi.

programme.title: Year 10
programme.desc: Il pianeta Terra si trova in un inverno senza fine a causa di un evento catastrofico e la razza umana è praticamente estinta. Nel profondo della foresta morente, Son e suo padre sopravvivono rovistando tra i resti del mondo precedente.

programme.title: Stakelander 2
programme.desc: In un futuro post-apocalittico, Martin vuole vendicarsi del nuovo leader di un esercito di vampiri, e per questo si mette alla ricerca di Mister, il suo mentore.

programme.title: Stakelander 2
programme.desc: In un futuro post-apocalittico, Martin vuole vendicarsi del nuovo leader di un esercito di vampiri, e per questo si mette alla ricerca di Mister, il suo mentore.

programme.title: 2151: Minaccia Aliena
programme.desc: Nell’anno 2151, Miller, un ufficiale incinta è a bordo di una capsula di salvataggio e deve lottare per la sopravvivenza insieme a ciò che resta del suo equipaggio.

programme.title: 2151: Minaccia Aliena
programme.desc: Nell’anno 2151, Miller, un ufficiale incinta è a bordo di una capsula di salvataggio e deve lottare per la sopravvivenza insieme a ciò che resta del suo equipaggio.

programme.title: Trancers - Corsa nel tempo
programme.desc: Jack Deth è un poliziotto nella tetra Los Angeles del futuro, nell'anno 2247. Whistler è riuscito a fuggire nel tempo e ora è a piede libero nella Los Angeles degli anni '80, ma Jack Deth è sulle sue tracce.

programme.title: Trancers - Corsa nel tempo
programme.desc: Jack Deth è un poliziotto nella tetra Los Angeles del futuro, nell'anno 2247. Whistler è riuscito a fuggire nel tempo e ora è a piede libero nella Los Angeles degli anni '80, ma Jack Deth è sulle sue tracce.

programme.title: Plus One
programme.desc: Tre amici vanno alla più grande festa dell’anno. Mentre la festa precipita nel caos i tre vedranno la loro amicizia messa in discussione e le loro stesse vite in pericolo.

programme.title: Plus One
programme.desc: Tre amici vanno alla più grande festa dell’anno. Mentre la festa precipita nel caos i tre vedranno la loro amicizia messa in discussione e le loro stesse vite in pericolo.

programme.title: The Last Days
programme.desc: La Terra è stata flagellata da un'epidemia mortale, e gli esseri umani sono costretti a vivere nel sottosuolo. Un ragazzo cerca di ritrovare la fidanzata passando per i sotterranei della metropolitana.

programme.title: The Last Days
programme.desc: La Terra è stata flagellata da un'epidemia mortale, e gli esseri umani sono costretti a vivere nel sottosuolo. Un ragazzo cerca di ritrovare la fidanzata passando per i sotterranei della metropolitana.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm
programme.desc: Quando Tremotino, malvagio del regno delle fiabe, distrugge lo Specchio magico ed entra nel mondo degli esseri umani, le principesse Cenerentola, Bella Addormentata, Biancaneve e Raperonzolo lo inseguono per batterlo e salvare l'umanità dalla schiavitù.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm
programme.desc: Quando Tremotino, malvagio del regno delle fiabe, distrugge lo Specchio magico ed entra nel mondo degli esseri umani, le principesse Cenerentola, Bella Addormentata, Biancaneve e Raperonzolo lo inseguono per batterlo e salvare l'umanità dalla schiavitù.

programme.title: King Cobra
programme.desc: Un serpente lungo 9 metri è fuggito da un laboratorio che stava conducendo ricerche sull'aggressività e sta per intrufolarsi nella festa di una piccola città.

programme.title: King Cobra
programme.desc: Un serpente lungo 9 metri è fuggito da un laboratorio che stava conducendo ricerche sull'aggressività e sta per intrufolarsi nella festa di una piccola città.

programme.title: Radius
programme.desc: Un uomo si risveglia da un incidente incapace di ricordare cosa sia successo. Vagando in cerca di aiuto finisce in una cittadina che sembra popolata solo da cadaveri. E l'orrore della situazione in cui si trova è destinato ad aumentare.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning
programme.desc: Philadelphia, Mississippi, 1964. A sleepy southern town steeped in tradition finds itself targeted for invasion.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Polly Klaas: Kidnapped
programme.desc: On October 1, 1993, a stranger abducted 12-year-old Polly Klaas during a slumber party in her home.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Above the Law
programme.desc: California Highway Patrolman George Gwaltney discovered the body of 23-year-old Robin Bishop near her car on a remote desert highway.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Death in Alaska
programme.desc: The day began like any other for Cheryl and Paul Chapman, until the silence of a peaceful Sunday morning was shattered with a phone call.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Paradise
programme.desc: It should have been Shangri-La, but when bad blood developed, piracy took over and the only law was the law of the jungle.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Crazy Don
programme.desc: To the FBI, he was believed to be the boss of New York's most powerful mafia organizationthe Genovese crime family. Was Gigante crazy or was his behavior a shrewd attempt to disguise his position as a ruthless mafia boss?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Unabomber
programme.desc: For nearly two decades a mathematical genius with delusions of single-handedly destroying industrial society, planted or mailed powerful bombs to unsuspecting innocent victims.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Murdering Cowboy
programme.desc: The sun set on the Wild West long ago, but some people refused to notice. Claude Dallas was one of them. A wily trapper, Dallas typified the rugged individualism that forged this country. He went too far when he killed two game wardens in 1981.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.sub-title: The True Story of Mississippi Burning

programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: The FBI Files: John Gotti: Convicted
programme.desc: John Gotti was ambitious, powerful and ruthless. He ruled with flash and conspicuous style, playing celebrity with the media and cat and mouse with the FBI. They called John Gotti the Teflon Don. Serious charges just wouldn't stick.

programme.title: FBI Files

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Elements Of Murder
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison. When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Compulsion
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker: the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Random Targets
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Traces Of Guilt
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence: a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Vanished
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Undaunted
programme.desc: Solving crimes may begin with gut intuition, but advanced science provides investigators with irrefutable proof. When criminals go to great lengths to mask their crimes, investigators must step up the challenge and remain forever undaunted.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Dealings
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Dealings
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Lethal Encounter
programme.desc: In most homicides, police rely on motive to pursue a murderer. But when the killer is a stranger the crime may go unsolved for years. It takes a full arsenal of forensic techniques to trace a lethal encounter.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Chemistry
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Chemistry
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Death Grip
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The Identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Material Witness
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Material Witness
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: From The Ashes
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: From The Ashes
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Misplaced Loyalty
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Misplaced Loyalty
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: En el punto de mira
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Reformas ruinosas
programme.desc: 'En el punto de mira' trata el tema de las reformas ruinosas que afecta a miles de españoles cada año. El programa habla con varios afectados por este tipo de timos y trata de desenmascarar a una de las presuntas empresas culpables.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: El nuevo made in Spain
programme.desc: España es el primer productor de Europa de aguacate y quinoa, dos productos cuyo consumo se ha disparado en todo el mundo debido a sus excelentes propiedades nutricionales. El programa investiga también las granjas de avestruces.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Hijos conflictivos (Samanta Villar)
programme.desc: Samanta Villar pone en el punto de mira a los hijos conflictivos. Durante la pandemia se ha disparado el maltrato de hijos a padres un 20%, ¿por qué?

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Especial La Palma Zona 0 en directo 2
programme.sub-title: Especial La Palma Zona 0 en directo 2
programme.desc: 'En el punto de mira' emite en directo desde La Palma para informar sobre la última hora del volcán de Cumbre Vieja, que ha escupido ya ochenta millones de metros cúbicos de lava.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Menores violentos y la mafia de los turistas estafadores
programme.sub-title: Menores violentos y la mafia de los turistas estafadores
programme.desc: El casco viejo de Bilbao ha acogido en las últimas semanas una oleada sin precedentes de delitos unidos por un denominador común: han sido cometidos por menores de edad.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Okupas familiares y conflictos vecinales
programme.desc: El programa investiga la nueva forma de apropiación ilegal de viviendas: la ocupación a raíz de disputas por herencias. El segundo reportaje ahonda en las guerras que se desatan en comunidades vecinales que alteran la vida de los propietarios.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Cobrar sin trabajar
programme.desc: Esta nueva edición investiga qué se esconde tras el absentismo laboral en España, uno de los países de Europa que más bajas laborales registra. El programa se desplaza a los juzgados de Valencia.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores de la luz y agresiones a médicos
programme.sub-title: Estafadores de la luz y agresiones a médicos
programme.desc: En España, para algunos usuarios, encender la luz es gratis, existen cientos de miles de enganches ilegales, un fraude que se costea entre todos los contribuyentes. Por otro lado, se mostrará el incremento en los últimos años de agresiones hacia médicos.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Comida lejana
programme.desc: El programa investiga la procedencia de parte del pescado y el marisco disponible en los mercados españoles, comprobando que en ocasiones se oculta la procedencia para venderlos como productos nacionales.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Ladrones de carrereta & enchufados en los ayuntamientos
programme.sub-title: Ladrones de carrereta & enchufados en los ayuntamientos
programme.desc: Cada año se cometen 30.000 robos en las carreteras españolas. Esta nueva edición de ‘En el punto de mira’ muestra el modus operandi de las bandas que cometen estos delitos y desvela, algunos casos relevantes de enchufes en la Administración Pública.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Ladrones de carrereta & enchufados en los ayuntamientos
programme.sub-title: Ladrones de carrereta & enchufados en los ayuntamientos
programme.desc: Cada año se cometen 30.000 robos en las carreteras españolas. Esta nueva edición de ‘En el punto de mira’ muestra el modus operandi de las bandas que cometen estos delitos y desvela, algunos casos relevantes de enchufes en la Administración Pública.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores del amor & nuevo despilfarro
programme.desc: El programa muestra el modus operandi de algunos depredadores sentimentales que utilizan internet y las redes sociales para robar a sus parejas. Además, una investigación sobre los casos de despilfarro en las administraciones públicas más llamativos.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores del amor & nuevo despilfarro
programme.desc: El programa muestra el modus operandi de algunos depredadores sentimentales que utilizan internet y las redes sociales para robar a sus parejas. Además, una investigación sobre los casos de despilfarro en las administraciones públicas más llamativos.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Dietas extremas
programme.desc: El espacio de reportajes analiza algunos de los métodos de adelgazamiento más peligrosos como la malla lingual o algunas pastillas cuya composición química es altamente perjudicial y que, sin embargo, pueden adquirirse fácilmente a través de Internet.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Dietas extremas
programme.desc: El espacio de reportajes analiza algunos de los métodos de adelgazamiento más peligrosos como la malla lingual o algunas pastillas cuya composición química es altamente perjudicial y que, sin embargo, pueden adquirirse fácilmente a través de Internet.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Okupas de larga duración & Añadidos en la comida
programme.sub-title: Okupas de larga duración & Añadidos en la comida
programme.desc: Un recorrido por viviendas habitadas por okupas que, burlando la ley, siguen viviendo en distintos inmuebles desde hace varios años, a pesar de tener órdenes de desahucio o haber sido denunciados.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Okupas de larga duración & Añadidos en la comida
programme.sub-title: Okupas de larga duración & Añadidos en la comida
programme.desc: Un recorrido por viviendas habitadas por okupas que, burlando la ley, siguen viviendo en distintos inmuebles desde hace varios años, a pesar de tener órdenes de desahucio o haber sido denunciados.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Dedazo en la sanidad
programme.desc: Más de un tercio del personal sanitario está contratado de manera opaca, al margen de criterios objetivos, un hecho que tiene repercusiones nefastas tanto para los propios profesionales como para los pacientes.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Dedazo en la sanidad
programme.desc: Más de un tercio del personal sanitario está contratado de manera opaca, al margen de criterios objetivos, un hecho que tiene repercusiones nefastas tanto para los propios profesionales como para los pacientes.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores del amor 2 & Asesores politicos
programme.desc: Caer en manos de un estafador sentimental tiene consecuencias económicas, psicológicas y, en ocasiones, penales. Los reporteros del programa investigarán a fondo tres casos de conocidos estafadores, como Albert Cavallé.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores del amor 2 & Asesores politicos
programme.desc: Caer en manos de un estafador sentimental tiene consecuencias económicas, psicológicas y, en ocasiones, penales. Los reporteros del programa investigarán a fondo tres casos de conocidos estafadores, como Albert Cavallé.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Amazon & Okupas chantajistas
programme.desc: En esta entrega del programa los reporteros investigan la compra-venta de datos personales online y su regulación con la nueva Ley de Protección de Datos.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Amazon & Okupas chantajistas
programme.desc: En esta entrega del programa los reporteros investigan la compra-venta de datos personales online y su regulación con la nueva Ley de Protección de Datos.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Las manadas
programme.desc: Tras el caso de ‘La Manada’ su efecto parece haberse multiplicado y los medios de comunicación se han hecho eco de otros casos de supuestas violaciones grupales.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Las manadas
programme.desc: Tras el caso de ‘La Manada’ su efecto parece haberse multiplicado y los medios de comunicación se han hecho eco de otros casos de supuestas violaciones grupales.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores de ancianos
programme.desc: 2 millones de ancianos viven solos en España y un 13% es víctima de estafadores. En uno de los reportajes más duros de la temporada, el programa investiga las tramas que despojan de su patrimonio a personas de avanzada edad sin apenas vínculos familiares.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: Estafadores de ancianos
programme.desc: 2 millones de ancianos viven solos en España y un 13% es víctima de estafadores. En uno de los reportajes más duros de la temporada, el programa investiga las tramas que despojan de su patrimonio a personas de avanzada edad sin apenas vínculos familiares.

programme.title: En el punto de mira: El Verano EEPDM : Costa Cálida (Murcia)
programme.desc: Las ventajas y desventajas del auge del turismo en la Costa Cálida: desde la gran oferta de deportes náuticos y la riqueza del ecosistema de su fondo marino hasta la temida "sopa verde" del Mar Menor provocada por la contaminación.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Four all-star chefs compete against each other in a holiday dish challenge judged by visiting family members. With a tie declared, Chef Ramsay steps in to crown the winner of a lunch at Saddle Peak Lodge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay announces that Nick, Michelle and Benjamin must design and cook a five-course menu. After tasting them, he announces that all three finalists will move forward.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Michelle and Benjamin compete to be the winner of the first ever Hell's Kitchen all-stars, and the head chef at Gordon Ramsay's Hell's Kitchen Restaurant at Caesar's Palace in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: For the first time ever, Chef Ramsay has relocated `Hell's Kitchen' to Las Vegas, to find out who will be the next head chef at the brand new Hell's Kitchen restaurant in beautiful Lake Tahoe.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs take on a shrimp challenge in which one hopeful makes a grave error, before a tough opening service for both teams. With Lisa Vanderpump and Wayne Brady in the VIP booths, the pressure is on.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The day begins with a Caesar salad challenge. As service begins, Olympic gold medallist Apolo Ohno and NFL star Marshall Faulk take the VIP seats.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Trouble brews in the Red team, with Amber questioning their choice of head chef. The challenge sees the teams tackling a reception for newlyweds, before a difficult service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with creating Mexican dishes, but only one can enjoy a treat, with the others having to clean out the animal pens. Later, a shock is in store at service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are challenged to put a twist on some classic Italian dishes, with a top reward for the winning group and a morale-sapping punishment for the losers.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs pair up and taste dishes containing both a land and sea element; the team who identifies all proteins correctly, with the fastest time, wins.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Back at Hell's Kitchen, the chefs receive a surprise phone call from Chef Ramsay saying that there is no dinner service, but someone will be going home.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: It's time for the iconic Blind Taste Test. The winners enjoy a helicopter ride, while punishment awaits the losers. Both teams struggle during service, but who will be sent home?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: With eight chefs left in the team challenge, the red and blue team are each responsible for creating five different burgers: beef, chicken, lamb, salmon and turkey.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs compete in the inaugural 'Spell's Kitchen' word scramble challenge and cook-off; HK is closed to the public and hosts a multi-course meal for charity.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Back at Hell's Kitchen, the chefs will compete in three difficult challenges to prove if they are worthy of a Black Jacket.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the first challenge with all black jackets, the chefs will be competing to make a unique dish with ingredients appearing along the way.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: In the first challenge with all black jackets, the chefs will be competing to make a unique dish with ingredients appearing along the way.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The chefs have 30 minutes to prep and 30 minutes to serve 40 portions of food to club-goers, who will then judge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The finalists face one more challenge before their final dinner service, and they're each paired with a Sous Chef to prepare.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Both teams prepare for the most important dinner service of their lives.

programme.desc: Twelve aspiring restaurateurs compete before chef Gordon Ramsay as he works to open a world-class restaurant in Los Angeles and discover the country's next culinary star.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: After barely making it through opening night, the contestants feel the pressure as they prepare for their second dinner service.

programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay puts aside the battle of the sexes and switches the chefs to even out the teams. The teams are put to the test during a lunch service cooking for a group of highly demanding customers.

programme.desc: Mark e Jonathan tornam-se conselheiros em um acampamento para crianças com câncer.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu
programme.desc: Jonathan e Mark estão ajudando os pacientes do Camp Good Times de maneiras diferentes. Mas um pai ainda se recusa a lidar com a doença do filho.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu
programme.desc: Jonathan abre mão de seus poderes angelicais por um tempo e percebe os perigos que Mark enfrentou por ser um policial.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu
programme.desc: Uma aspirante a atriz quer ser aceita por quem ela realmente é, e não pela imagem que seu pai bem-intencionado tenta transformá-la.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu
programme.desc: Mark foi enganado para vender sua alma para salvar a vida de uma menina. Mas o Diabo tem outra agenda: adquirir a alma de Jonathan.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu
programme.desc: Os operários das fábricas ignoram a contaminação do lençol freático, embora esteja deixando seus filhos doentes. Como resultado, Jonathan toma medidas drásticas para forçá-los a enfrentar os fatos.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu
programme.desc: Um time de beisebol da liga secundária nunca ganha, então Jonathan e Mark começaram a ajudá-los. Eles também ajudam um vendedor idoso que foi expulso do estádio.

programme.title: O Homem Que Veio do Céu

programme.title: CBS Saturday Morning
programme.desc: Each Saturday morning, Adriana Diaz and Kelly O'Grady report on the week's top stories; the broadcast, known for its signature segments The Dish and Saturday Sessions, offers insightful conversations with artists, authors, chefs and musicians.

programme.title: Bob Esponja Calça Quadrada
programme.desc: Bob Esponja é uma esponja do mar que vive na Fenda do Bikini e tem um talento incrível para fritar hambúrgueres de siri e se meter em confusões. Junto de seu amigo Patrick Estrela, Bob vive aventuras pra lá de malucas.

programme.title: Sorte no Amor
programme.desc: Ashley, uma mulher sortuda, troca sua sorte pela do Jake, que está na pior.

programme.title: Amor e Outras Drogas
programme.desc: Maggie e Jamie começam um relacionamento que os confronta com a doença e a droga do amor.

programme.title: Como Agarrar Meu Ex-Namorado
programme.desc: Stephanie Plum, desempregada e recém-divorciada, consegue um emprego na empresa de fianças de seu primo, onde sua primeira tarefa a coloca na pista de um policial local procurado por seu passado romântico.

programme.title: Spread - Jogando com Prazer
programme.desc: Nikki leva uma vida confortável, apenas seduzindo mulheres, até que um dia ele conhece uma garçonete que também gosta de seduzir. Os dois passam a realizar um jogo de disputas até que chega a hora em que precisam decidir entre o amor e o dinheiro.

programme.title: O Chamado de Xangai
programme.desc: Um advogado de Nova York é enviado a Xangai a negócios e logo enfrenta muitos problemas com a lei.

programme.title: Encalhados
programme.desc: Megan de 28 anos, vai a um reencontro de amigos da escola e percebe que sua vida continua a mesma de 10 anos atrás. Porém, ao receber um pedido de casamento de seu namorado, ela entra em crise.

programme.title: Solteiros com Filhos
programme.desc: Kristen Wiig, Maya Rudolph e Jon Hamm estrelam ao lado de Jennifer Westfeldt e Adam Scott em uma "comédia inteligente e espirituosa de relacionamento" (Entertainment Weekly) sobre um círculo de amigos cujas vidas mudam quando eles têm filhos.

programme.title: Nunca Fui Santa
programme.desc: Confiante e com opinião, Megan, de 17 anos, é muito obstinada para seus pais não-armados, que começam a se preocupar com o fato de ela ser lésbica.

programme.title: Nunca Fui Santa
programme.desc: Confiante e com opinião, Megan, de 17 anos, é muito obstinada para seus pais não-armados, que começam a se preocupar com o fato de ela ser lésbica.

programme.title: Finais Felizes
programme.desc: Um homem gay descobre que seu parceiro poderia ser o pai do bebê de uma amiga dos dois; pai e filho descobrem que estão saindo com a mesma mulher e mais histórias se entrelaçam neste espirituoso olhar sobre o amor, a família e a imprevisibilidade da vida.

programme.title: 10 Coisas que Deveríamos Fazer Antes de nos Separar
programme.sub-title: 10 Coisas que Deveríamos Fazer Antes de nos Separar
programme.desc: Na noite em que Abigail conhece Ben em um bar, eles, de forma cômica, começam a listar uma série de coisas que deveriam fazer antes, caso eles fossem um casal, se separarem - isso, sem eles sequer pensarem de fato em terem um relacionamento.

programme.title: Minha Melhor Amiga
programme.desc: A relao de um homem com sua melhor amiga colocada prova quando ela se casa e ele obrigado a enfrentar seus verdadeiros sentimentos.

programme.title: Um Novo Amor
programme.desc: George e Edith não tem nada em comum, exceto pelo fato de que seus filhos podem estudar no mesmo local, a Universidade de Middlleton. Acompanhando os rebentos, eles escapam da tediosa excursão pelo campus e rapidamente estabelecem uma conexão especial.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade
programme.sub-title: Arthur Goes To Camp/Buster Makes The Grade
programme.desc: Arthur and his friends go to summer camp where it's strictly boys vs. girls. Next, Buster Baxter is everyone's favorite jokester. Unfortunately, though, Buster's grades aren't as good as his jokes, and Buster may have to repeat third grade.

programme.title: Arthur: The Great MacGrady, Parts 1 & 2
programme.desc: When Mrs. MacGrady is diagnosed with cancer, Arthur and his friends all react differently to the news. The kids must learn how to come together to help support each other and Mrs. MacGrady.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Treasure Hunt/The Return Of The King
programme.desc: When Buster digs up an ancient arrowhead, everyone else wants to hunt for buried treasures, too. And a field trip to the Medieval Fair pits Arthur's class against another led by Ratburn's super-tough mentor, Mr. Pryce-Jones.

programme.title: Arthur: What Scared Sue Ellen?/Clarissa Is Cracked
programme.sub-title: What Scared Sue Ellen?/Clarissa Is Cracked
programme.desc: Sue Ellen's not afraid of much, but when she encounters a really creepy howling noise in the woods, she's scared for real. Then, Grandma Thora has a lot of fun stuff, especially her porcelain doll, Clarissa.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare
programme.sub-title: Arthur And The Big Riddle/Double Dare
programme.desc: Alex Trebek lends his voice as gameshow host Alex Lebek in this episode which poses the age-old riddle--is winning really everything? What if your friends dared you to skip homework--and then double dared you to skip school?

programme.title: Arthur: Get Smart/Baby Steps
programme.desc: Everyone loves HUGO--the new interactive whiteboard that claims to be 100% accurate. If only Mr. Ratburn knew how to use it. Mei Lin can say "hello" AND play the piano?!? Kate can't even wave!

programme.title: Arthur: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.sub-title: Adventures in Budylon/Ladonna Compson: Party Animal
programme.desc: D.W. and Bud embark on an epic wilderness adventure--the backyard has never been so exciting! Apple picking, bake sales, craft classes…there's so much to do in Elwood City in the fall! And Ladonna's determined to do it all.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.sub-title: Arthur Weighs In/The Law of the Jungle Gym
programme.desc: When Arthur doesn't fit into his costume for the play, he's shocked to learn that he's gotten "husky-sized." He gets serious about getting in shape. Muffy found the perfect place to take pictures with her new digital camera: the jungle gym.

credits.actor: Cameron Ansell|Daniel Brochu|Jason Szwimer|Melissa Altro|Bruce Dinsmore

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.sub-title: Arthur Writes A Story/Arthur's Lost Dog
programme.desc: Struggling with a school assignment, Arthur decides that his regular life is just too boring to write about. And, Arthur is the only one who believes in the superior intelligence of his dog. But even Arthur gets confused when Pal runs away.

programme.title: Arthur: Swept Away/Germophobia
programme.desc: Arthur, D.W. and Buster are spending a few days at the beach. Can they save their sandcastle from the ocean tides? Buster's friends have had enough of his sloppy habits, so they band together to educate him on the realities of bacteria.

programme.title: Arthur's First Day
programme.desc: It's finally the first day of fourth grade and Arthur couldn't be more excited - until he learns Buster is in another class! Meanwhile, D.W. is nervous for her first day of kindergarten. Will Arthur and D.W. be able to make new friends?

programme.title: Arthur: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.sub-title: When Carl Met George/D.W. Swims with the Fishes
programme.desc: George is excited about his new friend, Carl. Then George learns that Carl has Asperger's Syndrome – can they remain good friends? D.W. and James enter the pre-school swim meet and recruit their big siblings to coach them.

programme.title: Arthur: Shelter from the Storm (Part 1 & 2)
programme.desc: When a powerful hurricane hits Elwood City, everyone's affected. Ladonna's dad is called up by the Army Corps of Engineers. Muffy relocates to a shelter. And Arthur struggles to reunite lost pets and owners.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.sub-title: Arthur Makes A Movie/Go To Your Room!
programme.desc: Too young to see a real "James Hound" movie, the kids decide they'll make a film of their own. Next, how would YOU like to be four years old and completely misunderstood by your parents? And then be sent to your room for ten whole minutes?

programme.title: Arthur: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.sub-title: The Pea and the Princess/D.W. and Dr. Whosit
programme.desc: The 3rd grade class is putting on a production of “The Princess and the Pea,” and Prunella is at the helm as director! Then, Mom and Dad tell D.W. she’s too young to watch a new television show that everyone is talking about.

programme.title: Arthur: The Making of Arthur/Dancing Fools
programme.desc: When Matt Damon puts out a call for homemade videos for his TV show, he sets off a frantic rush as Arthur and his gang film their lives. Mrs. Molina is a teaching a dance class for kids. Will Francine and George be the next Fred and Ginger?

programme.title: Arthur: Buster's Breathless/The Fright Stuff
programme.desc: Will Buster's friends treat him the same after they learn he has asthma? Prankster have arrived in Elwood City--just in time for the "Scare Your Pants Off" costume party! It's boys vs. girls in what becomes a great big battle of the pranks.

programme.title: Arthur: My Club Rules/Stolen Bike
programme.desc: The gang can't agree on rules for their club, and each starts his own. Next, Francine's embarrassed by her crummy old bike. Why can't she have a shiny new one like all her friends?

programme.title: Arthur: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.sub-title: The Chronicles of Buster/On this Spot
programme.desc: Buster learns that special effects can't take the place of hard work when conquering real mountains. Arthur is thrilled to find out that Sitting Bull once passed through town! He rallies the residents to mark the spot with a monument.

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.sub-title: Buster Spaces Out/The Long Road Home
programme.desc: Inspired by footage of the moon landing, Buster wants to go to outer space someday! For now, it'd be cool to build and launch a rocket! Then, after costing Lakewood Elementary the win in a relay race, George wants to redeem himself.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.sub-title: Arthur's Family Vacation/Grandpa Dave's Old Country Farm
programme.desc: What's got moldy bathrooms, lumpy beds and lots of rain? Arthur's family vacation. Then, Arthur and D.W. go to visit their grandfather, but the visit doesn't turn out as expected, because Grandpa Dave isn't your usual kind of grandfather.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.sub-title: Arthur's First Sleepover/Arthur's New Year's Eve
programme.desc: Have you ever been afraid of the dark? Despite D.W.'s threat of aliens, Arthur sets his tent for his first sleepover. Then, what exactly happens at midnight, December 31st? There are plenty of rumors, but no one seems to know for sure.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.sub-title: Binky Barnes, Wingman/To Beat Or Not To Beat
programme.desc: Does Binky have a favorite pastime? Not until citywide Bug Week, when suddenly all he can think about is butterflies. Then, there's a horrible racket in Elwood City, and it's Francine practicing her singing and drumming for the Talent Show!

programme.title: Arthur: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.sub-title: My Music Rules/That's A Baby Show!
programme.desc: It's the duel of the century as cellist Yo-Yo Ma faces jazz saxophonist Joshua Redman in the toughest gig of their careers at the Elwood City Library! Then, will Arthur be exposed as a baby show lover?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Sells Out/Mind Your Manners
programme.desc: To earn the money for a new video game, Arthur decides to sell his old toys through his school's Web site. The Tibble Twins want to take Grandmother out to dinner, but she'd rather stay home. Is it because of their terrible table manners?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.sub-title: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.sub-title: Arthur The Wrecker/Arthur and The True Francine
programme.desc: Arthur always seems to wreck things, and this time it's Mom's computer. Can he get it fixed before Mom finds out? Then, Muffy A. Crosswire and Francine are absolute best friends, despite their rather obvious differences.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Meets Mister Rogers/Draw!
programme.desc: Mister Rogers is staying at Arthur's house! Mister Rogers is a nice guy, but... his show is for babies! Can Arthur hide the visit from his friends? Next, the trouble starts when Fern draws a not-too-flattering cartoon of Francine.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed
programme.sub-title: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed
programme.desc: Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky Wrestles with a Story/All Will Be Revealed

programme.desc: Binky spends the day with Bitzi Baxter and learns what it's like to be a news reporter. Then, D.W., Bud, and Rapty set out to solve the mystery of what really happened to D.W.'s snowball.

programme.title: Arthur: Cents-less/Buster the Lounge Lizard
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn decides it's time for his class to learn a little about money. For the entire weekend, no one in the class can spend a cent. Buster has the brand-new Dark Bunny Dark Buggy, complete with grappling hook and voice commands!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. on Ice/Spoiled Rotten!
programme.desc: D.W. tells her friends that she's a fantastic skater, but she can barely stand on ice! With a skating party coming up, how will she face everyone and tell them the truth? Accused of being spoiled, Muffy sets out to prove her friends wrong.

programme.desc: School is almost out and Arthur can hardly wait for those lazy summer days by Muffy's pool. Nothing could ruin such a happy time of year, except maybe D.W.'s Spring Pageant! And then D.W. can't wait to test out her new play set!

programme.title: Winx Club: El día de la justicia
programme.desc: Las chicas Winx vuelven a Tir Nan Og con los Wizards, pero acaban luchando por sus vidas cuando el reino mágico está en peligro.

programme.title: Winx Club: El secreto de Morgana
programme.desc: Nébula captura a Morgana, conquista Tir Nan Og y dirige su ejército a la dimensión Omega, donde se esconden el resto de los miembros del Círculo Negro.

programme.title: Winx Club: Hielo y fuego
programme.desc: Las chicas del Winx Club alcanzan a Layla y Nébula para derrotar a los malvados Wizards. Layla usa el espíritu de Nabu y los poderes de las Fairies de Tir Nan Og para restaurar el reino.

programme.title: Winx Club TV Specials ES 1: El club de las Winx
programme.desc: La vida de Bloom cambia radicalmente cuando descubre que es un hada, y comienza su aventura en el Colegio de Alfea. Junto con las Winx, luchará contra las malvadas Trix y descubrirá su poder, la Llama del Dragón, y su misterioso pasado.

programme.title: Winx Club TV Specials ES 1: La venganza de las Trix
programme.desc: Bloom descubre que es adoptada y, tras esta dramática revelación, el hada está decidida a averiguar todo lo que pueda sobre su familia. Sin embargo, le espera una intensa batalla, ya que las Trix siguen decididas a robarle su poder.

programme.title: Winx Club TV Specials ES 1: La batalla por Magix
programme.desc: Las Trix han robado el poder de la Llama del Dragón de Bloom, y sus amigos harán todo lo posible para ayudarle a recuperarlo. En la batalla final, las Winx derrotarán a las Trix, y las tres brujas serán encarceladas.

programme.title: Winx Club TV Specials ES 1: El fénix de la sombra
programme.desc: A las Winx se les unirá una nueva hada, Aisha, y lucharán contra un nuevo enemigo, Darkar. Bloom es la única que puede derrotarlo, y tras los contratiempos y las batallas, su amor por Sky lo hará posible.

programme.title: Winx Club: Un acontecimiento inesperado
programme.desc: Bloom, una chica normal, descubre que tiene poderes mágicos cuando se encuentra en medio de una pelea entre un hada, Stella, y un ogro, Knut.

programme.title: Winx Club: Bienvenida a Magix

programme.title: Winx Club: El instituto alfea para hadas

programme.title: Winx Club: El pantano de barro negro
